sign_in_message: Please enter your details to sign in
description: Streamline your architectural workflows with our next-generation coordination engine. Experience seamless integration across your entire stack.
forgot_password_subtitle: Enter your email to receive a password reset link
forgot_password_success_message: If an account exists for that email, we have sent a password reset link. The link will expire in 15 minutes. Please check your inbox and spam folder.
reset_password_subtitle: Choose a new password for your account
reset_password_invalid_link: Invalid reset link. Please request a new one.
reset_password_failed: Failed to reset password. Token may be invalid or expired.
reset_password_validation_min_length: Password must be at least 8 characters long.
reset_password_validation_uppercase: Must contain at least 1 uppercase letter.
reset_password_validation_lowercase: Must contain at least 1 lowercase letter.
reset_password_validation_special: Must contain at least 1 special character.
reset_password_validation_confirm_match: The two passwords do not match!
